message:
fix(raptorq): stricter test log schema validation catches whitespace-only fields, invalid outcomes, and null values

src/raptorq/test_log_schema.rs — Added VALID_UNIT_OUTCOMES constant
enumerating the allowed outcome strings. UnitLogEntry::new now asserts
non-empty scenario_id, parameter_set, replay_ref, and validates outcome
against the allowed list, catching typos and invalid states at construction
time rather than downstream. validate_unit_log_json upgraded to detect
whitespace-only fields (previously accepted as non-empty), null values in
required positions, and non-string types for required string fields. Added
8 new tests covering: whitespace-only scenario_id rejection, null value
detection, non-string type rejection, empty replay_ref rejection, invalid
outcome rejection, and the full valid-entry happy path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
